name: yourls-ui
description: Build pipeline for the YOURLS admin/public UI (Tailwind + Alpine.js + Blade).

scripts.build:css: postcss ui/assets/src/css/app.css -o ui/assets/dist/admin.css && postcss ui/assets/src/css/infos.css -o ui/assets/dist/public.css
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:manifest
scripts.dev: npm run watch:css & npm run watch:js
